inputs.label: Annual Interest Rate
inputs.businessContext: Fixed annual interest rate during both deferral and payout phases

inputs.label: Deferral Years
inputs.businessContext: Number of years the investment accumulates before payouts begin

inputs.label: Payout Years
inputs.businessContext: Number of years over which the accumulated value is paid out annually

formulas.totalPayoutAmount: payoutYears * ((presentValue * Math.pow(1 + annualInterestRate / 100, deferralYears)) * (annualInterestRate / 100) / (1 - Math.pow(1 + annualInterestRate / 100, -payoutYears)))
formulas.totalInterestEarned: payoutYears * ((presentValue * Math.pow(1 + annualInterestRate / 100, deferralYears)) * (annualInterestRate / 100) / (1 - Math.pow(1 + annualInterestRate / 100, -payoutYears))) - presentValue
